According to r/ChatGPT - Gemini and Claude is better 
According to r/Claude - ChatGPT and Gemini is better 
According to r/GeminiAI - Gemini struggles to compete with ChatGPT and Claude https://t.co/pFAuAnGXLB
https://t.co/hgD65EJ8ol

如果是 TypeScript 技术栈，做 Agent 开发首选 pi-mono，功能强，调用方便。其次是 vercel 的 aisdk 也还可以。

claude agent sdk 不那么推荐了，主要是绑死了 claude，但目前还有一个不可替代的优势，就可以共享 Claude Max 订阅，开发阶段会比较方便，能用多久不清楚。

应用层的话，electron

Markets seem to love this stuff

In 2018, Kodak said out of nowhere that it was a crypto company and its stock shot up

In 1998,  Zapata (an oil firm founded by the Bushes that became a fish meal company) shortened its name to https://t.co/nqMaODkYqt & IPO’ed as an Internet stock https://t.co/sE3OVN2kiC

Lovable just added payments.

Good timing. Because the Claude Code leak showed exactly what Anthropic is quietly building underneath them.

40 internal tools. Multi-agent orchestration. A harness architecture that runs everything.

Mythos is above Opus. Already in testing.

AI 泡沫股
鞋底发泡材质也是一种泡沫… https://t.co/n5KnMdetOD

AI做出来的东西不需要文科生

给写文章给推广吗

哈哈哈

世界是多样性的，人是多样性的，AI写文章并不能代替文科生！文科生有文科生的魅力！

Vibe coding一段时间

一开始感觉太快了，感觉自己的时间不够用，被AI催着走！

甚至觉得人类需要休息睡觉就是个愚蠢的设定！

搞了一些小项目后，现在我更加坚定【慢就是快】【勿期必】，与其制造垃圾，不如踏实的日拱一卒创造价值！

不要做AI的奴隶😂

近日，云南省农村信用社（以下简称“云南农信”）发布2026年校园招聘公告，其中个别行社岗位招聘条件设置引发关注。

针对公众关心焦点，云南农信高度重视，充分吸纳公众建议进行调整。现将云南农信2026年校园招聘有关事项信息更正如下：

I loved creating this cartoon.

Adobe added Kling 3 and Kling 3 Omni to Firefly. For the first time in a while, I had that feeling of “okay… this is getting very real.”

Consistent characters across shots used to be the hardest part. This made it feel… easy. 

Workflow below: https://t.co/M0rPnaWWdY

Step 1: Everything starts in Adobe Firefly Boards for me. I used a photo of me as a reference for the main character. Here in Boards I can use all the models, like Nano Banana 2 for making reference frames. 

Here's my storyboard: https://t.co/dmJr7lZnsj

Step 2: I upscale all the reference frames with Topaz Upscale right there in Adobe Firefly Boards. Then I look for imperfections that I can edit on the next step before generating videos. https://t.co/wS5ZNoETJZ

Step 3: I use Generative Fill right there in Adobe Firefly Boards to retouch all the "AI slop" parts. I can also take it to Photoshop as it's connected directly with it but sometimes I can use GenFill right there for speed. Also I can use Nano Banana 2 as an option for GenFill https://t.co/6xWxNJGaLD

Step 4: 
Creating characters in Kling 3 Omni in Adobe Firefly. 
Choose "Elements" -> "Create New". The name you'll give you'll use. 
You need to create a character for every outfit (ex. Princess, PrincessRat, Kris) 

Also, create consistent multiple characters and locations. https://t.co/pcNEI4uwlx

Step 5: This is what your prompting will look like with consistent characters that you just created in Step 6. 

Tip: if you need a loop animation, just use first and last frame the same frame. https://t.co/LW9xg76aXr
Step 6: I put videos and sounds together in Adobe Express https://t.co/0RlVZio14U

Step 7: Also I often pull frames in Adobe Express. If I need to save a frame in the middle, edit it and use as a reference frame, it's the fastest and easiest place. Just one button save. https://t.co/7eXq1ipl2K

Step 8: Video models, like Kling 3, can generate sound but sometimes I need to generate my own sounds effects and then I use Elevenlabs. 
I had to generate extra cheering sounds for the crowd and time it. https://t.co/PAx5K7xWJz
Consistent characters across shots used to be the hardest part. This made it feel… easy.

RT @icreatelife: I loved creating this cartoon.

Adobe added Kling 3 and Kling 3 Omni to Firefly. For the first time in a while, I had that…
This is so beautiful
